title: Missing width in assignment to typedefed wildcard

features.name: typedef wildcard associative array
features.description: Code should include a typedef declaration of a wildcard associative array type where the key type is omitted using [*]

features.name: associative array literal with default value assignment
features.description: Code should include an assignment to a typedefed wildcard associative array using an associative array literal that contains a default value entry
